text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho has arrived. There are
only five minutes left to enter the racecourse, but
Seiun Sky still hasn't shown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I made the decision not to bring her here myself
so she wouldn't feel forced to compete...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you wading.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nice to see you too... I guess.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I came up with a pretty good idea, and I couldn't
stand the thought of not trying it in a race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So... you know...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Are you listening? I have a plan to tear down that
wall.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you a hint about it—what's something I've
done every day with you?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep. I'll just tell you. When I face an opponent
who's always overcoming their own limits...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I have to overcome my limits and run away! That's
all there is to it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The final stretch at Tokyo Racecourse is long,
which means it's perfect for a racer like Spe who
bursts ahead toward the end.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking, what if I pushed past my own
limits and tried to maintain my top speed?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Clean out your ears, 'cause I'm about to let you in
on a huge secret...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I really, reaaally hate losing! Heehee. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh, of course you did. But I don't think anyone
else does.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
They don't know the sizzly, broiling hot fire
hidden behind my lovable facade.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I have the best chance of winning,
even compared to Spe and the others!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be yelling at myself to run, run, and run, until
the very end!
choice_data_list: Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!
Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It sure will be.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So, like... keep your eyes peeled and expect the
best and whatnot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll smash down that wall and come back to you
the victor!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll pull ahead at the last possible second! That's
my only option!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The last stretch is when the real challenge starts,
right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So if I sprint for it a second time then, I'll win!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Can't say it's not. But it's what I'm gonna try.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's like this—I've been pretty lax about
everything up until now, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, ta-daaa! I'm not gonna do that anymore!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I don't care how I look out there, I'm going all
out. No calculated tactics, no nothing—just the
real me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
No other racer has kept their abilities as hidden
as I have. You see...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm betting that there's still some hidden power
left for me to squeeze out at the very end!
choice_data_list: Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!
Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It sure will be.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So, like... keep your eyes peeled and expect the
best and whatnot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll smash down that wall and come back to you
the victor!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'll tear ahead at the hill! That's my only choice!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It may not be the steepest, but the Tokyo
Racecourse slope is still a force to be reckoned
with.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's a problem for everyone, which means it's the
perfect place to put some distance between me
and the others!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure, runners like Spe, with all their talents, would
keep the advantage crossing that section.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But... I've been climbing mountains with every
kind of method I can wrap my hands around.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Roads that look totally flat to others are to
me as difficult to climb as mountains.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You see... I'm going to turn my sense of inferiority
into my strength and keep climbing. That's how I'll
win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is no contest! There's no possible way I can
lose.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to unleash all the strength that's built
up inside me... and cross the finish line first!
choice_data_list: Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!
Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It sure will be.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So, like... keep your eyes peeled and expect the
best and whatnot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll smash down that wall and come back to you
the victor!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Soon as they pass me, I'll pass 'em right back!
That's all I can do!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Right when I'm in the zone charging forward is
when Spe and the others will come up from
behind.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But at that very moment, if I boost forward,
they'll be practically frozen in shock!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You bet it is.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think sudden comebacks fit within my
personal narrative?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
No one's been passed up as much as me,
especially since I have no special abilities or
strengths.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've had to use my head and brew up
ideas for dashing past anyone who's sprinted
ahead. And I've never given up when they gain
the lead back.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's always been my only path to winning. Each
time I had to think things through to the very end.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm just stubborn like that.
choice_data_list: Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!
Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It sure will be.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So, like... keep your eyes peeled and expect the
best and whatnot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll smash down that wall and come back to you
the victor!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I have to aim for the best racer! That's the only
way!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And I already know who I have to glue my eyes
to.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'll keep her under my thumb so she can't pull anything funny, then I'll be the one to snatch first. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What do winners need? Raw strength? Talent?
Luck? Nope, not in my book.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
They need to be the first one to cross the finish
line—that's all.
choice_data_list: You're really gonna show them your stuff.
You're really gonna show them your stuff.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. ☆ The curtains are rising on the first act
of my magic show!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
When they're about to win, I'll throw them off
their pace with a bluff... and use that opening to
push forward.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's right, I have to use my head! That's the
unique thing I've been improving this entire time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's my secret weapon.
choice_data_list: Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!
Sounds like this'll be a real spectacle!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It sure will be.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So, like... keep your eyes peeled and expect the
best and whatnot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll smash down that wall and come back to you
the victor!
